Welcome to Burbank Hire Cars

Where every journey is infused with professionalism and the personal touch of our experienced chauffeurs.

As your trusted provider for luxury transport, we offer a fleet that includes everything from sleek sedans to spacious limousines, each equipped to deliver an exceptional travel experience.

Why Choose Us

Why Choose Burbank Hire Cars

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed, comprehensively insured, and compliant with all transport regulations.

Professional Chauffeurs

Impeccably presented, highly trained, and committed to the highest standard of service.

Always Punctual

Real-time flight monitoring, precise scheduling, and a guarantee of on-time arrivals.

Premium Vehicles

Late-model luxury vehicles maintained to the most exacting standards of comfort and safety.

Our Services

Luxury for Every Occasion

Executive Car Hire

Arrive in commanding style with our premium executive fleet. Ideal for corporate travel, business meetings, and VIP transfers.

Learn More

Wedding Car Hire

Make your special day truly unforgettable with our exquisite wedding car service. Elegance, grace, and impeccable attention to detail.

Learn More

Parties & Nights Out

Turn heads and arrive together. Our party limousines make every celebration an extraordinary event from the very first moment.

Learn More

Airport Transfers

Seamless transfers to Sydney and Newcastle Airport. Punctual, reliable, and stress-free.

Learn More

Cruise Ship Transfers

Seamless port transfers for cruise passengers. Arrive at the terminal relaxed and ready to embark on your voyage.

Learn More

Formal Car Hire

School formals, galas, and black-tie events deserve a grand entrance. Our formal car hire ensures you arrive in spectacular fashion.

Learn More

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I book a vehicle?
You can book online through our booking system, submit an enquiry through our contact form, or call us directly on (02) 4390 5043.
What areas do you service?
We service the entire Central Coast region of New South Wales, including Gosford, Wyong, Terrigal, Erina, Woy Woy, and The Entrance. We also cover Sydney, Newcastle, the Hunter Valley, and surrounding areas.
How far in advance should I book?
We recommend booking as early as possible, particularly for weddings and major events. However, we can often accommodate last-minute requests subject to availability.
What is your cancellation policy?
Cancellations made more than 48 hours in advance receive a full refund. Please contact us for specific details regarding your booking.
Do you provide child seats?
Yes, child seats and booster seats are available upon request at no additional charge.
Is there a minimum hire time?
Minimum hire times vary by service. Airport transfers have no minimum, while party and event bookings typically require a minimum of 3 hours.

Contact Us
